text: In 2014, the most sold product was Staple envelope and was overall moderately profitable year with a margin of 10.2% while having a below-average performing sales among all years. The total sales were $484247.50. Additionally the average discount given was 15.8% (53.0% of orders were discounted).

In 2015, the most sold product was Easy-staple paper and was overall moderately profitable year with a margin of 13.1% while having one of the weakest performing sales among all years. The total sales were $470532.51 and compared to the last period, there was shrinkage. Additionally the average discount given was 15.6% (51.3% of orders were discounted).

In 2016, the most sold product was Staple envelope and was overall moderately profitable year with a margin of 13.4% while having an above-average performing sales among all years. The total sales were $609205.60 and compared to the last period, there was strong growth. Additionally the average discount given was 15.5% (51.8% of orders were discounted).

In 2017, the most sold product was Easy-staple paper and was overall moderately profitable year with a margin of 12.7% while having one of the strongest performing sales among all years. The total sales were $733215.26 and compared to the last period, there was strong growth. Additionally the average discount given was 15.6% (52.0% of orders were discounted).
